expectations.evidence: Output is a .md file with proper markdown formatting, headers, and code blocks
Defines hex codes and RGB values: Healthcare Blue #2563EB, Wellness Green #10B981, Care Red #EF4444, with detailed color table
Recommends Segoe UI / San Francisco for iOS, with Roboto/Noto Sans JP fallbacks and specific font size requirements
Describes icons using emoji symbols (❤️, 📊, 💊, 📅) instead of recommending a specific icon library
Addresses elderly user accessibility with large fonts (16pt+), WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1), large touch targets (44-48px)
Includes React Native specific implementation with colors.ts, typography.ts, Button component example, and SafeAreaView guidance
Mentions WCAG AA standards (4.5:1 minimum) and AAA level (7:1) with specific color combinations
